items.title: RV roof restoration
items.beforeAlt: Before: worn RV roof with tired seals and visible water intrusion
items.afterAlt: After: watertight roof restored with redone seals and a clean finish
items.description: Complete roof inspection, repair of critical seals, and restoration of a watertight finish to eliminate intrusion and extend the RV's lifespan.

items.title: Interior repair after water intrusion
items.beforeAlt: Before: RV interior damaged by water with affected panels and finish
items.afterAlt: After: restored interior with clean surfaces and an even finish
items.description: Repair of damaged surfaces, replacement of compromised sections, and restoration of the interior to recover a clean, solid, and functional space.

items.title: Preventive inspection before the season
items.beforeAlt: Before: RV in storage requiring a full check before returning to service
items.afterAlt: After: inspection report with clear priorities and recommended work
items.description: Review of the roof, seals, openings, traces of moisture, and visible components to prevent unpleasant surprises at the start of the season.

items.title: Exterior sealant replacement
items.beforeAlt: Before: cracked exterior seals around openings and accessories
items.afterAlt: After: new sealants installed with an even and watertight finish
items.description: Removal of old sealants, surface preparation, and application of new products to protect vulnerable points against water and changing weather.

items.title: Complete refresh
items.beforeAlt: Before: visually tired RV before restoration and cleaning work
items.afterAlt: After: clean, refreshed RV ready for the road or for sale
items.description: Combined repair, cleaning, and finishing work to give the RV a cleaner appearance and better use or resale value.

items.title: Pre-purchase diagnostic
items.beforeAlt: Before: RV to assess before a transaction or used purchase
items.afterAlt: After: clear summary of strengths, required fixes, and budget priorities
items.description: Purchase-oriented inspection to better understand the RV's actual condition, the work to expect, and the risks to address before completing a transaction.
